acceptance_criteria.criterion: The fleet audit inspects every active Claude flat agent file and every active Codex TOML agent file in the configured installation roots, reports per-harness counts, and returns non-zero when an expected fleet yields zero inspected agents.
Generated in-loop and cold reviewer configurations for Claude and Codex expose read-only file and repository inspection but no write/edit capability and no mutating shell or workspace-write sandbox.
Capability resolution does not translate a reviewer need for safe command inspection into a workspace-write Codex sandbox.
Regression tests reproduce the obsolete-layout false-success and workspace-write reviewer failures before the fix and pass after the fix.
An installed-fleet smoke check confirms the generated reviewer artifacts and audit result match the source role constraints.

commits.message: test(CL-c6bc): red - reviewer sandbox and fleet audit regressions
feat(CL-c6bc): green - enforce read-only reviewers and fleet audit

external_resources.purpose: Real unified reviewer source used by cognovis fleet regression and smoke build
Real agent-base layers used for review-agent smoke build when COGNOVIS_CORE is set
Real model-standard layers used for review-agent smoke build when COGNOVIS_CORE is set

scope_changes.description: Updated existing cognovis fleet tests to honor COGNOVIS_CORE and tolerate current real fixture shapes: phase wrapper agents without composed bases and the small allowlist of source-level Claude tools boundaries.
scope_changes.reason: The previous hardcoded sibling path made the whole file skip in this worktree; enabling the real fixture exposed stale assumptions unrelated to this bead's production code.

scope_changes.description: Updated the smoke script's haiku model-standard check to accept the current cognovis-core model-standard filename haiku.md and model_id coverage.
scope_changes.reason: The smoke script must be runnable with COGNOVIS_CORE set so the new reviewer smoke can exercise the real source.

downstream_impacts: Unified agent sources with pair_loop_constraints.run_shell=read_only now force Codex sandbox_mode to read-only after capability resolution and defaults.
Claude artifacts for those pair-loop read-only sources drop Write/Edit/MultiEdit tool grants defensively.
A new canonical scripts/agent-fleet-audit.py can be used by installers or CI to fail closed when configured agent roots are empty or missing.
